request.description: Add or remove an activity from favorites. If activity is already favorited, it will be removed. If not favorited, it will be added.
Get all favorite activities for the current member (authenticated user). Returns array of activities with full details including host information.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Morning Yoga Session",
  "description": "Join us for a rejuvenating morning yoga session in the park. All levels welcome!",
  "category": ["Wellness & Mindfulness", "Sports & Fitness"],
  "location": "Springfield Park",
  "date": "2024-12-28T00:00:00.000Z",
  "time": "08:00",
  "maxParticipants": 20,
  "price": 15,
  "recurring": "one-time",
  "additionalInformation": "Please bring your own yoga mat and water bottle. We will meet at the main entrance.",
  "picture": "https://example.com/yoga-image.jpg"
}

query.description: Price filter: all, free, or paid
Max distance in km (uses member's radius if not provided)
Price filter: all, free, or paid

request.description: Get activity by ID (public endpoint). Works for both authenticated and unauthenticated users. If authenticated, includes booking status (isBooked, bookingStatus, bookingId).
Get activity by ID with authentication. Includes booking status (isBooked, bookingStatus, bookingId) if member has booked the activity. Same endpoint as public version, but with authentication token.
Get activity by ID for authenticated members. Always includes booking status (isBooked, bookingStatus, bookingId). Alternative endpoint specifically for members.
Create a booking for an activity. For paid activities, paymentMethodId is required. Payment will be authorized and held in escrow until host approves.

query.description: Filter bookings: upcoming (confirmed with future dates), pending, past (confirmed with past dates), cancelled, or all

request.description: Get filtered bookings for the current member. Filter options: upcoming (confirmed bookings with future activity dates), pending (awaiting approval), past (confirmed bookings with past activity dates), cancelled, or all.

Member cancels their own confirmed booking. Refund policy: 48+ hours = 99% refund (1% fee), 24-48 hours = 49% refund (50% penalty + 1% fee), <24 hours = no refund. Free bookings are cancelled immediately.
Get all pending bookings for the current host (authenticated user).
Get booking details by ID. Member, host, or superAdmin can view their own/related bookings.
Host approves a pending booking. For paid activities, payment will be captured (released from escrow) and transferred to host.
Host declines a pending booking. For paid activities, payment authorization will be cancelled (no charge to member).

query.description: Filter by status: pending, confirmed, cancelled, or all
Optional: Filter by specific activity ID. Leave empty for all activities.

request.description: Get host dashboard data with booking counts and filtered results. Query params: status (pending/confirmed/cancelled/all) and activityId (optional).
Get all confirmed bookings for a specific activity (for marking attendance). Only returns bookings for activities owned by the host.
Mark attendance for a booking. attendanceStatus can be 'present' or 'absent'. Only works for confirmed bookings owned by the host.
Member rates and reviews a past activity. Rating must be 1-5 stars. Only confirmed bookings for past activities can be rated. One rating per booking.
Get all ratings for an activity (public endpoint). Returns average rating, total ratings count, and list of ratings.
Get all ratings given by the current member (authenticated user).

Get reviews dashboard data for member including: rating history (average rating, total reviews, rating distribution), activities to review (past activities without ratings), and past reviews (already submitted reviews).
Get host reviews dashboard with summary stats: average rating, total reviews, rating distribution (1-5 stars), response rate (%), and pending responses count.
Get all reviews for host's activities. Returns average rating, total reviews, and full reviews array with member and activity details. Includes hostReply if host has replied.

query.description: Optional: Filter reviews by activity ID. If not provided, returns all host's reviews.

request.description: Get reviews for a specific activity. If activityId is provided, returns reviews for that activity only. Otherwise returns all host's reviews. Includes hostReply if host has replied.
Host can reply to a member's review. One-time reply only - member cannot reply back. Requires ratingId and reply text. Host can only reply to reviews for their own activities.
Member can send a message to host about an activity. Email will be sent to host and message saved in DB.
Host can reply to a member's message. Email will be sent to member and reply saved in DB.

item.name: Broadcast Message (Host to All Booked Members)

request.description: Host can broadcast a message to all confirmed/pending booked members of an activity. Broadcast types: reminder, event_cancel, general_info. Email will be sent to all members and messages saved in DB.

Get all messages received by the current user (inbox). For host: shows messages from members. For member: shows messages from host (replies and broadcasts). Returns messages with sender, activity, parent message (if reply), and seen status.
Get all messages sent by the current user. Shows messages you have sent to others.
Mark a message as seen. Updates isSeen to true and sets seenAt timestamp.
Get count of unread messages for the current user.
Get all broadcast messages sent by the host. Returns unique broadcasts grouped by activity, subject, and timestamp. Includes sentTo count (number of members who received the broadcast).

query.description: Optional: Filter broadcasts by activity ID

request.description: Get broadcast messages for a specific activity. If activityId is provided, returns broadcasts for that activity only. Otherwise returns all host's broadcasts.
